title: Herbal Fluffy Spanish Chicken Stir-Fry
description: This Mediterranean-inspired dish features chicken stock concentrate, herbs, and a touch of kneading to achieve fluffy textures in a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, basil, mint)
1/2 cup chicken stock concentrate
ingredients.notes: Reconstituted with hot water to make 4 cups liquid

instructions: In a small bowl, mix chicken stock concentrate with hot water until fully dissolved.
Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and pepper. Arrange on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix minced garlic, chopped peppers, mixed herbs, lemon juice, olive oil, and remaining liquid from the chicken stock mixture in a large bowl. Add seasoned chicken pieces and toss to coat evenly.
Spread the chicken pieces in a single layer over the prepared pan. Bake for 20 minutes or until chicken is fully cooked (internal temperature reaches 165°F).
Reduce heat to 325°F (160°C) while resting the chicken pieces on a cooling rack. Pour remaining marinade into a small saucepan, add in any accumulated juices from the baking pan.
Heat over medium-high and bring mixture to a simmer. Simmer for about 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened. Toss with rested chicken pieces just before serving.
Serve hot alongside your choice of side dish such as quinoa or steamed vegetables.
